comment.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://www.bilibili.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bilibili.com%2F) ### Comment > The website will display channel recommendations in the last column. However, when randomly appearing ads are blocked, the channel recommendations may appear in any column randomly, disturbing the visual layout. > > Hope to revert to the previous ad block placeholder, and block the ad block prompt above. ``` Username: @TatleCat ``` ### Screenshots

comment.body:
Hi, it's fixed at https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/commit/9eb3366249dc70391a9d58043bdce757954e9df8 . Unfortunately, MV3 extension cannot update filters due to Google policy, so new rules will be available in one of the next extension updates.

In the meantime, please try adding this as a custom rule to user rules:

```adblock
cizgivedizi.com#%#//scriptlet('prevent-window-open')
```

issue.title: _Originally posted by @rockettnyc in [#225844]
issue.body:
> I do not know what  the request for me to  "Please check if AdGuard is detected on" is supposed to achieve...it simply leads me to a mafrket pahge for the product.  in addition, I have a problem with the dismissive  note "_This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity. Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs."___
> I pay for adguard, and therfore have a right to expect it to worlk as claimed, consistently.  When this does not occur, AdGuard has an obligation to address and resolve its failure to perform in exchange for payment it has received. Dismissal of the reported issue on the basis of "websites not popular enough" is in fact a breach of contracted services. On this basis, please consider this a notice  ands demand for service, Copies of this demand will be provided to AdGuard customer service, as well as the FTC, and DC Office of Consume Affairs.  Jeffrey P. Rockett, Esq. 

 _Originally posted by @rockettnyc in [#225844](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/225844#issuecomment-4024261898)_

comment.body: @rockettnyc, are you still having that problem, or has it been resolved?

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://auth.polar.com/login?response_type=code&scope=POLAR_SSO&client_id=flow&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fflow.polar.com%2FflowSso%2Fredirect&state=bb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fauth.polar.com%2Flogin%3Fresponse_type%3Dcode%26scope%3DPOLAR_SSO%26client_id%3Dflow%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fflow.polar.com%252FflowSso%252Fredirect%26state%3Dbb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9) ### Comment > It happens on all pages of auth.polar.com, while main site polar.com works correctly. > It happens with AdGuard enabled and even if I disable it: no text label appears, so I don't know which field is which, and also text message errors (like "password wrong") do not appear. It also happens on Edge, where I don't have the Adguard extension > > I know it is AdGuard because it happens the same if I try and connect with Chrome on my mobile phone: it does not show any text label. However, only in my mobile phone, if I disable Adguard there, the text labels get shown as normal ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5w3spbqf85s8ws4kkgo4kgck44ws8sskw2r8qi77wg.png?nc=1)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://auth.polar.com/login?response_type=code&scope=POLAR_SSO&client_id=flow&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fflow.polar.com%2FflowSso%2Fredirect&state=bb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fauth.polar.com%2Flogin%3Fresponse_type%3Dcode%26scope%3DPOLAR_SSO%26client_id%3Dflow%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fflow.polar.com%252FflowSso%252Fredirect%26state%3Dbb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9) ### Comment > It happens on all pages of auth.polar.com, while main site polar.com works correctly. > It happens with AdGuard enabled and even if I disable it: no text label appears, so I don't know which field is which, and also text message errors (like "password wrong") do not appear. It also happens on Edge, where I don't have the Adguard extension > > I know it is AdGuard because it happens the same if I try and connect with Chrome on my mobile phone: it does not show any text label. However, only in my mobile phone, if I disable Adguard there, the text labels get shown as normal ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5w3spbqf85s8ws4kkgo4kgck44ws8sskw2r8qi77wg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/pcwgc7hm2348ccockgkc00w8wow0w80ca57w6hafao.png?nc=1)
### System configuration Information | Value --- | --- AdGuard product: | AdGuard Browser Extension v5.3.0.21 MV3 System version: | `Windows 11` Browser: | Chrome Tracking protection: | disabled Filters: | Ad blocking:
AdGuard Base

Other:
Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion

Language-specific:
EasyList Italy Filters last update: | February 27, 2026 at 09:01 Other extensions used: | `AdGuard, Adobe Acrobat, Free Download Manager, Zecento` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=ext&product_version=5.3.0.21&system_version=Windows+11&manifest_version=3&browser=chrome&filters=2.10.109&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=false&stealth.DNT=true&filters_last_update=2026-02-27T09%3A01%3A11)

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://auth.polar.com/login?response_type=code&scope=POLAR_SSO&client_id=flow&redirect_uri=https%3A%2F%2Fflow.polar.com%2FflowSso%2Fredirect&state=bb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fauth.polar.com%2Flogin%3Fresponse_type%3Dcode%26scope%3DPOLAR_SSO%26client_id%3Dflow%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%253A%252F%252Fflow.polar.com%252FflowSso%252Fredirect%26state%3Dbb8fffee-3f88-4441-82ed-a68d570f40e9) ### Comment > It happens on all pages of auth.polar.com, while main site polar.com works correctly. > It happens with AdGuard enabled and even if I disable it: no text label appears, so I don't know which field is which, and also text message errors (like "password wrong") do not appear. It also happens on Edge, where I don't have the Adguard extension > > I know it is AdGuard because it happens the same if I try and connect with Chrome on my mobile phone: it does not show any text label. However, only in my mobile phone, if I disable Adguard there, the text labels get shown as normal ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/5w3spbqf85s8ws4kkgo4kgck44ws8sskw2r8qi77wg.png?nc=1)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
One thing, scriptlets are not supported by all platforms (the same about CSS rules - `#$#`), so in a such case `#$#` rule should be used:
```adblock
interstyl-sklep.pl#$#.consents { display: none !important; }
```
This way website will be not broken when scriptlet is not applied.

But I think that in this case you can just add it to the current rule:
```adblock
#%#//scriptlet('set-local-storage-item', 'show_consent_modal', '1')
```
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/ca3ec514a7b81fe10ee891e3f774d1977ca0dcdb/AnnoyancesFilter/Cookies/sections/cookies_specific.txt#L3094

It's a section for "generic" rules and this rule is domain specific, so could you please move it to "specific" section?
https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/7d23948a18f61e223febfb7d711eadcaea3cd528/AnnoyancesFilter/Widgets/sections/widgets.txt#L1551-L1553

comment.body:
> One thing, scriptlets are not supported by all platforms (the same about CSS rules - #$#), so in a such case #$# rule should be used:

```adblock
interstyl-sklep.pl##.consents
```

The cosmatic rule syntax – `##.classname` support all platforms. aren't they?

comment.body:
Yes, it's supported by all platforms.
In this case, the problem is that `inert` attribute causes that elements on the website are not interactive.
So if `interstyl-sklep.pl##.consents` is added, then website will be broken on platforms that do not support scriptlets (iOS app free version and AdGuard Content Blocker).
In general, for such cases, we can use `#$#` rule instead, because it's also not supported by these platforms.
@zloyden Ok, I got it.

issue.title: Fix #226645 interstyl-sklep.pl
issue.body:
# Creating the pull request

## Prerequisites

### To avoid invalid pull requests, please check and confirm following terms

- [x] This is not an ad/bug report;
- [x] My code follows the [guidelines](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) and [syntax](https://kb.adguard.com/general/how-to-create-your-own-ad-filters) of this project;
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my own changes;
- [x] My changes do not break web sites, apps and files structure.

## What problem does the pull request fix?

### If the problem does not fall under any category that is listed here, please write a comment below in corresponding section

- [ ] Missed ads or ad leftovers;
- [ ] Website or app doesn't work properly;
- [ ] AdGuard gets detected on a website;
- [ ] Missed analytics or tracker;
- [ ] Social media buttons — share, like, tweet, etc;
- [x] Annoyances — pop-ups, cookie warnings, etc;
- [ ] Filters maintenance.

## What issue is being fixed?

### Enter the issue address

Fix #226645 interstyl-sklep.pl

### Add your comment and screenshots

`ssl.ceneo.pl/shops/sw.js` script loads the third-party review widget (floating promo/review widget embedded via iframe).

<details>
<summary>Screenshots</summary>

| Small widget | Extended widget |
| :--: | :--: |
| ![Screenshot 2026-03-11 at 12 40 00 PM](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/231bf978-67fc-4fad-ba6e-2a1211d380a0) | ![Screenshot 2026-03-11 at 12 39 50 PM](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9efd40e2-8c6d-49a8-9ded-f6490d4964f8) |

</details>

So, I added the rule with `$third-party,domain` modifiers:

```adblock
||ssl.ceneo.pl/shops/sw.js^$third-party,domain=interstyl-sklep.pl
```

### Terms

- [x] By submitting this issue, I agree that pull request does not contain private info and all conditions are met

comment.body: Rebased to avoid merge commits since the changes overlap with the master branch.
